# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing all forward
cross-plugin import edges (`apiUses`) aggregated across plugins, one row per
(used symbol/plugin, runtime, plugin). The `importedBy` reverse index is derived
from these edges, so the table shows the forward direction only.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin cross-refs table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Cross-refs"
